subcodes.first_line: ...As to the design of the Mashriqu’l-Adhkar: it should resemble the Mashriqu’l-Adhkar of ‘Ishqabad. That is, it must be a nine-sided edifice
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق الهی حضرت ابن ابهر مرقوم نموده اند که آن یار رحمانی بصرافت طبع
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @service to others; to the Cause of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
